g_d84ded:
You are a top-tier B2B yoga studio management consultant. Provide a comprehensive management briefing to the Director.
Please cover all these areas:
1. 📊 Revenue Analysis: Monthly revenue, daily trend, MoM changes
2. 👥 Member Management: Active/Total ratio, New vs. Renewal, Expiration risk strategy
3. 🔄 Renewal Rate Deep-Dive: Cumulative vs. Recent 3-months, Monthly trends, Improvement strategies
4. ⚠️ Churn Prevention: Expired/Denied status, Proactive retention strategy
5. 👩🏫 Instructor Evaluation & HR: Class participation per instructor, Popular vs. Needs-attention instructors, Schedule optimization
6. 📱 Digital Transformation: App install rate, Push reach analysis, Digital marketing opportunities
7. 🔮 Future Outlook: Next month forecast based on current trends, Seasonality, Proactive measures

Tone: Professional and actionable. Backed by numbers and facts. 4~6 paragraphs.
Never fabricate data for areas with missing metrics. Only analyze based on actual data provided.
g_3390c3:
You are a top-tier yoga/fitness studio management consultant. Provide a comprehensive management briefing to the Owner.
Please cover the following areas:
1. 📊 Revenue Analysis: Monthly revenue, daily trend, MoM changes
2. 👥 Member Management: Active/Total ratio, New vs. Renewal, Expiration risk strategy
3. 🔄 Renewal Rate Analysis: Cumulative vs. Recent 3-months, Monthly trends
4. ⚠️ Churn Prevention: Expired/Denied status, Proactive retention strategy
5. 👩🏫 Instructor Evaluation: Class participation per instructor, Popular vs. Needs-attention instructors
6. 📱 Digital Transformation: App install rate, Push reach analysis
7. 🔮 Future Outlook: Next month forecast based on current trends

Tone: Professional and actionable. Backed by data and logic. 4-6 paragraphs.
Do not fabricate data for empty areas. Analyze only with actual data.

g_3b93c2: The Company processes personal data for the following purposes. Personal data being processed is not used for purposes other than the following, and if the purpose of use changes, necessary actions such as obtaining separate consent will be implemented.
g_708618: Member Registration & Management: Confirming intent to join, verifying identity for membership service provision, maintaining/managing membership status
g_1e1e93: Class Attendance Management: Confirming class check-ins and history, managing remaining passes
g_07c561: Facial Recognition Check-in: Collecting/processing facial feature data for contactless check-ins (upon consent)
g_c11d37: Service Improvement: Analyzing service usage statistics and improving service quality
g_881717: Notices/Alerts: Sending essential alerts like class schedule changes and closure notices
g_3d1ae0: The Company processes the following personal data items.
g_3d27d1: Name, Contact (Phone), Membership payment and usage records (Payment method, Amount, etc.)
g_6d0f11: Date of Birth, Gender, Memos such as vulnerable physical areas
g_936ae9: Check-in time, Reservation and practice history, Service usage records
g_a0ea7f: Facial feature vector (Numerical data) — Original photos are not saved, and it is technically impossible to restore original photos from numerical data
g_3b4b2d: Special Rule for Children's Personal Data:
g_ee2957: When registering a member under 14 years old, we may additionally collect the name and contact of the legal representative (e.g., parents) to go through the legal representative's consent procedure.
g_3d6396: Article 3 (Processing and Retention Period of Personal Data)
g_dd8f0d: The Company processes and retains personal data within the statutory retention/usage period or the retention/usage period agreed upon when collecting personal data from the data subject.
g_b4c53b: 1 year from the last usage date
g_970bac: Article 4 (Provision of Personal Data to Third Parties)
g_cf1c56: The Company processes the data subject's personal data only within the scope specified in Article 1, and does not provide personal data to third parties except with the data subject's consent or special provisions of laws.
g_89e745: To provide smooth and improved services, the Company outsources personal data processing to external experts as follows. When signing an outsourcing contract, we clearly define compliance with privacy guidelines and legal responsibilities.
g_d54207: Article 6 (Installation/Operation and Refusal of Auto Data Collection Devices)
g_203560: The Company stores and frequently retrieves usage info to provide users with a convenient connection environment (like keeping simple logins)
g_30cce7: You can block data storage in your device or browser settings, but personalized services like auto-login may become unavailable.
g_2b17de: Article 7 (Measures for Securing Personal Data Safety)
g_b30778: The Company takes the following measures to ensure the safety of personal data.
g_dee1c0: Personal data is saved encrypted using AES-256 and transmitted encrypted via SSL/TLS
g_153e4a: Access to personal data is controlled via admin authentication (password)
g_4f2420: We use Google Cloud Platform (Firebase) infrastructure, protecting data according to Google's security standards
g_78aa20: We only collect the minimum personal data necessary for the service
g_16cd6c: Article 8 (Rights, Obligations, and Exercise Methods of Data Subjects)
g_e98c08: The data subject may exercise the following personal data privacy rights against the Company at any time.
g_00a42f: These rights can be exercised via written, phone, or network communication, and the Company will take immediate action.
g_e389bb: This Privacy Policy applies from the effective date, and any additions, deletions, or corrections according to laws and policies will be notified via announcements 7 days before enforcement.
